# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd-demo
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: linkerd-demo

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: linkerd-demo

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: linkerd-demo

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: linkerd-demo
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "128Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend
      containers:
      - name: frontend
        image: nginx:alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: linkerd-demo
  labels:
    app: backend
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/skip-outbound-ports: "3306"
        config.linkerd.io/trace-collector: linkerd-collector.linkerd:55678
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend
      containers:
      - name: backend
        image: nginx:alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        - containerPort: 9090
          name: admin

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: linkerd-demo
  labels:
    app: database
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/skip-inbound-ports: "3306"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: database
      containers:
      - name: database
        image: mysql:8.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 3306
          name: mysql
        env:
        - name: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
          value: "password"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: linkerd-demo
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: frontend

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: linkerd-demo
  labels:
    app: backend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  - port: 9090
    targetPort: 9090
    protocol: TCP
    name: admin
  selector:
    app: backend

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: linkerd-demo
  labels:
    app: database
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 3306
    targetPort: 3306
    protocol: TCP
    name: mysql
  selector:
    app: database

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-http
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-admin
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-mysql
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  port: mysql
  proxyProtocol: opaque

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-http-from-frontend
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: frontend
        namespace: linkerd-demo

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-admin-deny-all
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-admin
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts: []

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: database-from-backend
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  server:
    name: database-mysql
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: backend
        namespace: linkerd-demo

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-authz-policy
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: core
    kind: Service
    name: backend
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - name: backend-mtls-auth
    kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    group: policy.linkerd.io

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: backend-mtls-auth
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  identities:
  - "frontend.linkerd-demo.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: database-authz-policy
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: core
    kind: Service
    name: database
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - name: database-mtls-auth
    kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    group: policy.linkerd.io

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: database-mtls-auth
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  identities:
  - "backend.linkerd-demo.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: backend-route
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  parentRefs:
  - name: backend
    kind: Service
    group: core
  rules:
  - matches:
    - path:
        type: PathPrefix
        value: /api
      method: GET
    backendRefs:
    - name: backend
      port: 8080

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-api-limited
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  server:
    selector:
      matchLabels:
        app: backend
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: frontend
        namespace: linkerd-demo
    networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
  namespace: linkerd-demo
data:
  config.yaml: |
    proxyInjectEnabled: true
    proxyInjectAnnotation: linkerd.io/inject
    defaultProxyResources:
      cpu:
        request: 100m
        limit: 500m
      memory:
        request: 128Mi
        limit: 256Mi
